topics: A brief account of the development of fermentation technology. Role of bioprocess Engineer in Bioprocess Industry. Process flow sheeting. Outline of the various unit operations used in upstream and downstream operations in a bioprocess industry. Isolation, and preservation of industrially important microorganisms, improvement of industrially important micro
organisms using protoplastfusion and DNA technology. Criteria for the transfer of inoculums, development of inoculum for yeast and bacterial cultures
Capital cost estimation -operating cost estimation - profitability analysis - GMP and cGMP
Utilities in a bioprocess plant. Industrial processes for the manufacture with the important engineering problems involved in the manufacture of the following products with a flow diagram
reactions and condition: Primary metabolites- Organic acids (Citric and lactic acid
acetone-butanol) Industrial Applications of primary metabolites
Steroid transformation process. Industrial Applications of secondary metabolites. Microbial production of industrial enzymes: (Proteases
amylases) Industrial Applications of enzymes. Production of recombinant proteins: Manufacture of human insulin
Monoclonal antibody production. Industrial Applications of recombinant proteins
Biohydrogen and biomethane production. General treatment(Primary secondary and tertiary treatments)and disposal methods of effluents generated from the fermentation industry
